title: notodanthonia oreophila
intro: Notodanthonia oreophila, also known as the alpine button daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Restionaceae. This plant is native to Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Notodanthonia oreophila has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory infections, due to its potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
